HOCO Y100 Smartwatch for Boys and Girls - 2G Model

The HOCO Y100 is a smartwatch designed especially for children, combining modern style with exceptional functionality. This device is not only attractive but also offers a variety of features that facilitate communication and entertainment for young children.

Main Features

  • Screen: A 1.44-inch screen with a resolution of 128x128 pixels, ideal for clear and sharp viewing of apps and messages.
  • Chip: Equipped with a powerful RDA8955 chip, which guarantees smooth and efficient performance in all watch functions.
  • Memory: It has 32 MB of internal memory, allowing for fast and efficient operation, as well as the storage of messages and basic applications.
  • Battery: Its 400 mAh battery provides a duration of 2 to 3 days, depending on usage, ensuring that the watch is available when you need it most.
  • Connectivity: Supports Nano SIM card (includes adapter for Micro SIM), allowing you to easily make and receive calls.
  • Network: Works only on 2G networks; make sure your service provider still supports this network for optimal performance.
  • Positioning: It uses base stations for location, although it is not equipped with GPS, which may affect the accuracy of location tracking.
  • Languages: Supports up to 14 languages, including English, Spanish, Russian, Arabic and more, making it accessible to a wide variety of users.

Product Benefits

The HOCO Y100 offers a number of benefits that make it ideal for children:

  • Call Function: Facilitates communication between the child and their parents, ensuring they are always in contact, providing peace of mind to the parents.
  • Intuitive Interface: Its user-friendly and easy-to-use design allows children to navigate without difficulty, fostering autonomy and confidence in the use of technology.
  • Lightweight and Comfortable: Its lightweight design makes it perfect for everyday use, without causing discomfort to children's wrists, allowing for prolonged use.
  • Multifunctionality: In addition to receiving messages and making calls, it also allows music playback, making it a versatile and entertaining device for young people.

Technical Specifications

The following are the technical specifications of the HOCO Y100 smartwatch:

  • Screen: 1.44 inches, 128 x 128 resolution
  • Chip: RDA8955
  • Memory: 32 MB + 32 MB
  • Battery: 400 mAh, with a working time of 2-3 days
  • SIM support: Nano SIM, includes calling option
  • Network: Only supports 2G networks
  • Positioning: Based on base stations (without GPS)
  • Supported languages: 14 languages, including English, Spanish, Russian, Arabic, and more

The HOCO Y100 smartwatch is an exceptional choice for parents looking for a modern and functional device for their children. With its communication capabilities, attractive design, and ease of use, this smartwatch becomes the perfect companion for keeping children connected with loved ones safely and enjoyably. Through its multiple functions, the HOCO Y100 not only ensures communication but also promotes fun and learning, making it a valuable tool in children's daily lives.

The HOCO Y100 smartwatch for boys and girls! Connectivity and fun at your children's fingertips, now in stock in the Canary Islands. Make every moment special.

Name: USB Fast Charger Power Adaptor
Description:
ANG TC15A Single USB Adaptor 1A

Charge your devices quickly and reliably with the ANG TC15A Single USB Adapter 1A. Engineered for efficiency and stability, this compact adapter delivers a steady DC 5V⎓1A output through its GaN USB port, ensuring fast charging without overheating. Its advanced fast-charge technology and USB Power Delivery (PD) compatibility optimize power flow, minimizing charge times for smartphones, tablets, and other USB-powered gadgets.

Key Features:

  • Brand: ANG-TC15A

  • Output: DC 5V 1A for reliable, steady charging.

  • Fast Charging Technology: USB Power Delivery & Quick Charge support for accelerated power up.

  • GaN USB Port: Efficient power conversion in a smaller, cooler running form factor.

  • Stable Connection: Precision engineered to prevent voltage fluctuations and protect your devices.

  • Compact Design: Lightweight and portable perfect for travel, office, or home use.

Why Choose ANG TC15A?

The use of Gallium Nitride (GaN) technology allows the ANG TC15A to operate cooler and more efficiently than traditional silicon adapters. Its single port design keeps things simple just plug in your USB charging cable and go. With built in safety protections against over current, over voltage, and short-circuit conditions, you can trust your devices are safeguarded during every charge.

The electric blanket is made from 100% polyester which is soft to touch but durable, providing added comfort to your mattress. Featuring three heat settings that you can adjust to set the temperature that is just right for you.The Silentnight So Snug Electric Blanket is an energy efficient and affordable way to stay warm for less. Pre- heating your bed for 2 hours on a low heat setting costs from as little as 1p, so you can afford to cosy up night after night. As sleep experts we recommend turning off the appliance before falling asleep to regulate your core temperature for a less disturbed sleep.Double size measures 120cm x 135cm

Name: TASSIMO HAPPY FRIENDLY COFFEE MACHINE BLACK
Description:
TASSIMO BLACK HAPPY FRIENDLY COFFEE MACHINEThe TASSIMO HAPPY Friendly coffee machine provides you and your loved ones a huge variety of hot beverages at the touch of a button. Whether it's a classic coffee, latte macchiato, hot chocolate or espresso, enjoy your hot drink in no time. It is very easy to use: Just insert your T Disc, press once and the TASSIMO coffee machine scans the barcode on the coffee disc. Then it automatically prepares the perfect hot drink for you, your family or your friends. Thanks to its stylish design it is an eyecatcher in every home. The adjustable cup stand allows you to use all your favourite mugs and glasses.
Tassimo brings the whole family’s favourite hot drinks into the comfort of your home, from creamy lattes and rich americanos to velvety hot chocolates. Enjoy café-quality drinks from brands you know and love, including L’OR, Costa, Kenco and Cadbury. With something for everyone, Tassimo makes it easy to enjoy your perfect drink at the touch of a button, whenever you want it. It’s your coffee shop at home: no queues, no fuss, just great taste.​

Name: Braun All In One Shaver Series 5
Description: Braun’s versatile All-in-One Grooming Kit for men. The 7in1 Tool Kit lets you effortlessly trim your beard, ears, nose, clip your hair and manscape your whole body. Comfortably achieve precision and efficiency with the Ultra Sharp Blade. Safely and perfectly body groom with SensitiveTrim technology. 14 length settings and AquaGrip for underwater use give you full grooming control. Braun AIO Series 5 is built to last, waterproof and with up to 120-min runtime Li-Ion battery.Box content: 1 trimmer, 6 combs, 1 cleaning brush

Name: Wahl Lifeproof Shaver
Description: - The 3-cut system ensures you can achieve a close and comfortable shave in as few strokes as possible- 90 minute cordless run time- Perfect for wet or dry useThe Wahl Lifeproof shaver delivers ultimate power and durability with its shock proof housing design that can withstand the rigours of everyday life. Featuring Lithium Ion technology, this shaver has an impressive run time of 90 minutes on a full charge. The 5-minute quick charge feature also provides 15 minutes of use so it will always be available to use when you need a quick shave. The pop-up precision trimmer provides quick and easy detailing that is suitable for face and body. This shaver also uses a dual floating head system where the flex foils adjust to the contours of the face that allows you to achieve a comfortable, clean, close shave and a smooth finish. Perfect for wet or dry use, the Lifeproof shaver can be used anywhere and is waterproof for up a 1 metre (or for up to 30 minutes) which makes this shaver the perfect tool for easy use and cleaning. Avoid accidental activation while transporting with the handy travel lock feature. Simply hold button down for 3 seconds to engage/ disengage.
